---
title: "Rāg Bhairav"
subtitle: "*Rudradeva trinayana aruṇa*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Mānadās &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Āḍācautāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> rudradeva trinayana aruṇa jaṭājūṭa  
> pināka dhāraṇa śivahara girijā pati bṛkhaba bāhana

**Antarā**

> nīlakaṇṭha gaja-carmāmvara ḍamaru bāje bājana tāpara  
> triśūlapāṇī purāṇa purukha sakala dīna trāṇa

**Sañcārī**

> nara kaṅkāla māla phaṇigaṇa phana phanāta  
> aradhacandra bhāla bhasma aṅga bhūkhana

**Ābhog**

> yogīsvara maheśa jaga dagdha karata nāśa  
> mānadāsa unake paga nitahī karata dhyana

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Āḍācautāl is a 14-beat cycle. In this notation layout, the fourteen columns are visually grouped as **2 + 4 + 4 + 4**, so the divider lines fall after beats 2, 6, and 10.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .adacautal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | S | G | r | - | - | S | S | S | $\mn{N}$ | S | S | S | - |
| **ru** | **dra** | **de** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **va** | **tri** | **-** | **na** | **ya** | **na** | **-** |
| S | r | G | m | m | - | m | G | P | m | G | r | - | S |
| **a** | **ru** | **ṇa** | **ja** | **ṭā** | **-** | **jū** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ṭa** |
| m | - | m | - | m | G | m | - | P | P | d | P | m | G |
| **pi** | **-** | **nā** | **-** | **-** | **ka** | **dhā** | **-** | **ra** | **ṇa** | **śi** | **va** | **ha** | **ra** |
| m | m | n | d | d | P | m | G | $\lb{mP}$ | m | G | r | r | S |
| **gi** | **ri** | **jā** | **-** | **pa** | **ti** | **bṛ** | **kha** | **ba** | **-** | **bā** | **-** | **ha** | **na** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .adacautal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| d | - | d | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **nī** | **-** | **la** | **ka** | **-** | **ṇṭha** | **ga** | **ja** | **ca** | **-** | **rmā** | **-** | **mva** | **ra** |
| $\tr{r}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{G}}\tr{r}}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{N}\tr{S}}$ | d | d | d |
| **ḍa** | **ma** | **ru** | **bā** | **-** | **je** | **bā** | **-** | **ja** | **na** | **tā** | **-** | **pa** | **ra** |
| P | n | d | - | d | - | d | - | P | - | P | m | - | G |
| **tri** | **śū** | **-** | **-** | **la** | **-** | **pā** | **-** | **ṇī** | **-** | **pu** | **rā** | **-** | **ṇa** |
| G | m | n | d | P | m | m | G | $\lb{mP}$ | m | G | r | - | S |
| **pu** | **ru** | **kha** | **sa** | **ka** | **la** | **dī** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **trā** | **-** | **-** | **ṇa** |

:::

## Sañcārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .adacautal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | S | $\lb{\sps{S}d}$ | - | d | - | P | m | - | G | r | G | m | P |
| **na** | **ra** | **ka** | **-** | **ṅkā** | **-** | **la** | **mā** | **-** | **la** | **pha** | **ṇi** | **ga** | **ṇa** |
| m | G | $\lb{-m}$ | r | - | S | S | $\mn{N}$ | $\mn{d}$ | $\lb{\sps{S}\mn{d}}$ | - | - | - | S |
| **pha** | **na** | **pha** | **nā** | **-** | **ta** | **a** | **ra** | **dha** | **ca** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ndra** |
| S | - | S | - | S | r | G | m | - | P | m | G | r | S |
| **bhā** | **-** | **la** | **-** | **bha** | **-** | **sma** | **a** | **-** | **ṅga** | **bhū** | **-** | **kha** | **na** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .adacautal}

| **X** |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| m | - | $\lb{\sps{n}d}$ | - | d | d | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{r}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{m}}\tr{G}}$ | $\tr{P}$ |
| **yo** | **-** | **gī** | **-** | **sva** | **ra** | **ma** | **he** | **-** | **śa** | **ja** | **ga** | **da** | **gdha** |
| $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{m}$ | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{r}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{\sps{N}\tr{S}}$ | d | d | P | d |
| **ka** | **ra** | **ta** | **nā** | **-** | **śa** | **mā** | **-** | **na** | **dā** | **-** | **sa** | **u** | **na** |
| P | m | P | m | G | m | $\lb{nd}$ | - | P | m | G | r | - | S |
| **ke** | **-** | **pa** | **ga** | **ni** | **ta** | **hī** | **-** | **ka** | **rata** | **dhyā** | **-** | **-** | **na** |

:::
